name: Close-Grip Bench Press
resistance_profile: Heavy compound triceps loader; shoulder-width grip.
execution_steps: Lie on a flat bench and grip the barbell about shoulder-width apart.
Unrack and hold the bar over your chest with wrists stacked over the elbows.
Lower the bar to your lower chest, keeping the elbows tucked toward your sides.
Press back up to lockout, driving hard through the triceps.
good_when: You want to overload the triceps with heavy compound barbell loading.
Building pressing strength that carries over to the flat bench press.
You respond well to free-weight work over machines.
bad_when: Your wrists or elbows get irritated by a fixed narrow-ish grip.
You want a lengthened-biased triceps stimulus (choose an overhead extension).
Only dumbbells or cables are available.
